metadata.description: claude-obsidian: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion by AgriciDaniel

plugins.name: claude-obsidian
plugins.description: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Sets up a persistent, compounding wiki vault. v1.7 "Compound Vault" adds default Obsidian CLI transport, hybrid retrieval (Anthropic Sept 2024 contextual retrieval pattern: BM25 + cosine rerank), per-file advisory locking for safe multi-writer ingest, and a pre-commit verifier agent. v1.7.1 closes the BLOCKER + 6 HIGH findings from the v1.7.0 audit; contextual-prefix data egress now requires explicit --allow-egress consent. Optional DragonScale Memory extension (log folds, deterministic addresses, semantic tiling lint, boundary-first autoresearch). Pairs with kepano/obsidian-skills (recommended) for canonical Obsidian primitives.

recommendedCompanions.rationale: Canonical substrate for Obsidian primitives (obsidian-markdown, obsidian-bases, json-canvas, obsidian-cli) authored by Obsidian CEO. claude-obsidian's overlapping skills (obsidian-markdown, obsidian-bases, canvas) defer to these when available and fall back to self-contained implementations when not.
